zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lockhart於1684年1月13日出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾藍納可時，他的父親Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr36歲，母親Lady Margaret Burnet41歲。他於大約1694年與Sara Paton在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1684年住在蘇格蘭藍納可爾藍納可。他去世於1724年10月8日在美國維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lockhart于1684年1月13日出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾藍納可时，他的父亲Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr36岁，母亲Lady Margaret Burnet41岁。他于大约1694年与Sara Paton在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1684年住在苏格兰藍納可爾藍納可。他去世于1724年10月8日在美国弗吉尼亚州諾福爾可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lockhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Old French locart, a Normanno-Picard form of Old French lo(s)chart ‘one who squints, who is cross-eyed’, attested in 13th- and 14th-century Arras (Pas-de-Calais) as Louchard, Lochard, Locard and Locart. It is a derivative of Latin luscus ‘one-eyed’. In France Locard is mostly found in Normandy (especially Calvados) c. 1900, while Louchart is mainly concentrated in Pas-de-Calais at the same time.

History: According to family tradition, Sir Simon Locard held the key to the locked silver casket in which Robert the Bruce's heart was taken to be buried in the Holy Land in 1329. This unverifiable story is no doubt related to the later spelling of the Scottish surname as Lockhart and to the addition of a heart and fetterlock to the family coat of arms (date unknown).

variants.name: Lockard
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Lockhart   1 and 2.

variants.name: Lockart
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Lockhart  .

variants.name: Luckhardt
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic female personal name Liutgard, a compound of liud ‘people, tribe’ + gard ‘protective enclosure, yard’. Liutgard was a popular name in medieval times; among others it was the name of the daughter of emperor Otto I and the wife of Charlemagne.

variants.name: Lochard
meanings: French: from a derivative of Old French loche ‘loach’, later also ‘species of giant slug’, hence, in the latter case, a nickname for a slow man. This surname is also found in Haiti.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lockhart was born on 13 January 1684, in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr, was 36 and his mother, Lady Margaret Burnet, was 41. He married Sara Paton about 1694, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He lived in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland in 1684. He died on 8 October 1724, in Norfolk, Virginia, United States, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lockhart est né le 13 janvier 1684, à Lanark, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Burnet, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Sara Paton environ 1694, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il a vécu à Lanark, Lanarkshire, Écosse en 1684. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1724, à Norfolk, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lockhart am 13. Januar 1684 in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr 36 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Burnet 41. Er hat um 1694 in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland Sara Paton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1684 hat er in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland gelebt. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1724 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Norfolk, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lockhart è nato il il 13 gennaio 1684 nel Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Burnet, aveva 41 anni. ja.lifeSummary: John Lockhartが1684年1月13日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアラナルクで生まれた時，父Capt James Horatio Lockhart Srは36歳，母Lady Margaret Burnetは41歳であった。約1694年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルでSara Patonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1684年にはスコットランドラナルクシュアイアラナルクに住んでいた。彼は1724年10月8日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ノーフォルクで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lockhart(이)가 1684년 1월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 랜아르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Burnet(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1694년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 Sara Paton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1684년도에 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 랜아르크에서 살았다. 그는 1724년 10월 8일 미국 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lockhart родился 13 января 1684 г. в местности ланарк, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Burnet, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara Paton около 1694 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он жил в местности ланарк, ланаркшир, Шотландия в 1684 году. Он умер 8 октября 1724 г. в местности норфолк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 40 лет.
